description: Detects C# catch clauses that may silently swallow exceptions (empty catch, catch-return-default, overly broad catch). Simplified from Rust: flags all catch_clause nodes. Cannot distinguish empty vs non-empty bodies, return-default patterns, or Exception vs specific types. Higher false positive rate.

flag.message: Catch clause detected -- verify it logs, rethrows, or handles the exception appropriately. Empty catch blocks silently swallow exceptions.
